MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem William Rauch, Clerk K. Shaw, Not Reported. (206)

Appearances:
Gwen Washington, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority.
Cindy Lee, Esq. representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Brandy Smith is present.
Myrrhia Resneck, Esq. representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date is off calendar.
